title: Engineering
description: This is engineering for our project.

sections.text: Our project followed the engineering design cycle. We began by designing our biosensor parts based on existing literature. We then built these genetic constructs using standard cloning techniques. The testing phase involved characterizing the performance of each part individually and as a system. The learnings from these tests informed the design of our second iteration of improved parts.
